title: Y@how`addiyn #3086
definition:
Jehoaddan = "Jehovah delights"

 1) wife of king Joash and mother of king Amaziah of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jehoaddan = "Jehovah delights"

 1) wife of king Joash and mother of king Amaziah of Judah

    NASB:  perh. the LORD delights, mother of King Amaziah
